subject: Echoing Horn — a spiraling white horn or conch-like object depicted in motion with teal-green swirling energy lines around it.
description: The card depicts a white spiraling horn or conch-shaped object surrounded by swirling teal-green energy lines and a circular motion effect. The background is a pale blue-white gradient suggesting an outdoor or sky setting. The object is centered and dominates the frame. The composition is clean and graphic, more illustrative than painterly. The energy lines give a sense of resonant sound or call.
foreground: white spiraling horn or conch object with teal swirling energy lines
